title: glyceria distans var. festuciformis
intro: Glyceria distans var. festuciformis, also known as tall mannagrass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Glyceria distans var. festuciformis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
